name: Original Bisquick Dumplings
author: yourprincess
description: Original Bisquick dumplings recipe straight from the box. Two ingredients, 15 minutes, fluffy every time. Drop into your favorite soup or stew and let them steam until pillowy soft.

step_sections.name: Dumplings
steps: Mix 2 cups Bisquick and ⅔ cup milk until soft dough forms.
Drop dough by spoonfuls onto stew (do not drop directly into liquid). Cook uncovered over low heat 10 minutes. Cover and cook 10 minutes longer.
Depending on where you live, you may need to add more liquid.

notes: The secret is... DO NOT OVER MIX! and let them set for a few minutes, so they rise.
